input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7995 [Automation] javac compile fails for com.graphql-java:graphql-java:2018-07-30T00-23-12-bfee885; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The reported javac failures are API-version mismatches from reusing tests written for graphql-java 19.7: this 2018 artifact has SchemaParser.parse(File/Reader/String), DataFetchingEnvironmentBuilder.newDataFetchingEnvironment(), and no PropertyDataFetcher setUseSetAccessible/setUseNegativeCache methods.
The existing 19.7 test build has a relocated Guava workaround for 19.7 bytecode; jdeps/POM inspection of 2018-07-30T00-23-12-bfee885 did not show a comparable Guava requirement.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: graphql-java is an in-process GraphQL engine; the resolved artifact brings its required runtime dependencies transitively and does not need an external service, Docker image, environment variable, system property, or extra Maven dependency for meaningful tests.
